task_completion.description: Open the Sales Opportunity window in iDempiere and initiate a new record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface is visible with the 'Sales Opportunity' window open and a blank or new record form displayed.

task_completion.description: Select 'C&W Construction' as the Business Partner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'C&W Construction' is visible and selected in the Business Partner field.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Oak Street Office Park' as the Subject or Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Oak Street Office Park' is visible in the Subject or Name field.

task_completion.description: Set the Expected Amount to 120,000 and Probability to 40%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '120000' (or '120,000') is entered in the Opportunity Amount field, and '40' is entered in the Probability field.

task_completion.description: Select a Sales Stage related to 'Proposal' or 'Quote'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A value containing the word 'Proposal' or 'Quote' is selected in the Sales Stage dropdown or field.

task_completion.description: Set Expected Close Date to 3 months from today and enter the description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date exactly 3 months in the future (relative to the system clock visible in the OS taskbar) is in the Expected Close Date field, and the Description field contains text mentioning 'oak trees'.

task_completion.description: Save the new Sales Opportunity record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual indicator that the record was saved, such as a 'Record Saved' status message, the save icon being greyed out, or the new record appearing in the list view.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the iDempiere web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the iDempiere CRM UI, not a terminal, database client, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Data was entered into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values are typed into the correct form fields within the iDempiere application, rather than just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the HTML of the page to show the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Business Partner: 'C&W Construction'. Subject/Name: 'Oak Street Office Park'. Expected Amount: 120000. Probability: 40. Description must contain 'oak trees'. Expected Close Date must be exactly 3 months from the system date at the time of execution. Sales Stage must be related to 'Proposal' or 'Quote'.
